verses.text: Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suanlekhakte ahi hi
Esau in Kanaan numeite zi-in la hi. Hit mi Elon' tanu Adah, Hiv mi Zibeon' tapa Anah' tanu Oholibamah
leh Nebaioth' sanggamnu, Ishmael' tanu Basemath ahi hi
Adah in Esau tawh Elifaz nei a, Basemath in Reuel nei hi
Oholibamah in Jeush, Jalam, leh Korah nei hi. Hihte pen Kanaan gam sunga a neih Esau' tapate ahi hi

Tua ciangin Esau in a zite, a tapate, a tanute, leh ama innkuan sunga mi khempeuh; a bawngte, a ganhingte khempeuh; leh Kanaan gam sunga a lam a neihsa khempeuh la-in a sanggampa Jakob kiang panin gamdang khatah paikhia hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ten' khop theih dingin amau' neihsate tam lua a, a ganhingte uh hangin tawlkhat a omna uh leitang in amaute vak zolo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Seir mualtung gamah Esau teng hi. Esau' min dang khat pen Edom ahi hi
Hihte pen Seir mualtung gama Edom mite' pupi Esau' suanlekhakte ahi hi
Esau' tapate: Esau' zi Adah' tapa Elifaz, Esau' zi Basemath' tapa Reuel ahi hi
Elifaz' tapate: Teman, Omar, Zefo, Gatam, leh Kenaz ahi hi
(Timna pen Esau' tapa Elifaz' zineu hi a, amah in Elifaz tawh Amalek nei hi.) Hihte pen Esau' zi Adah' tapate ahi hi
Reuel' tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, leh Mizzah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esau' zi Basemath' tapate ahi hi
Esau' zi, Zibeon' tapa Anah' tanu Oholibamah tapate: Jeush, Jalam, leh Korah ahi hi
Esau' suante hih bang ahi hi. Esau' ta masa Elifaz' tate: Teman, Omar, Zefo, Kenaz
Korah, Gatam, leh Amalek ahi hi. Hihte pen Edom gam sungah Elifaz' suante hi a, Esau' zi Adah' sunga piangte ahi hi
Esau' tapa Reuel' tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, leh Mizzah hi a, Edom gam sungah a om Reuel' suante ahi hi. Amaute pen Esau' zi Basemath' sung panin a piangte ahi hi
Esau' zi Oholibamah' tapate: Jeush, Jalam, leh Korah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esau' zi, Anah' tanu Oholibamah' sung panin a piangte ahi hi
Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suante hi a, amaute' sung pan beh lutangte ahi uh hi.
Tua gama teng Hori mi Seir' tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah
Dishon, Ezer, leh Dishan hi a, Edom gam sunga Seir' suante ahi Hori mite' sung pan beh lutang ahi uh hi
Lotan' tapate: Hori leh Heman ahi hi. Lotan' sanggamnu Timna ahi hi
Shobal' tapate: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shefo, leh Onam ahi hi
Zibeon' tapate: Ai-ah leh Anah ahi hi. Amah pen a pa Zibeon' late a cin' laitakin gamlakah a sa ciktui a mupa Anah ahi hi
Anah' tate: Dishon leh Anah' tanu Oholibamah ahi hi
Dishon' tapate: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, leh Kheran ahi hi
Ezer' tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan, leh Akan ahi hi
Dishan' tapate: Uz leh Aran ahi hi
Hori mite' beh lutangte: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah
Dishon, Ezer, leh Dishan ahi hi. Hihte pen Seir gam sungah amau' beh ciatin Hori mite' sung pan beh lutang ahi uh hi.
Hihte pen Israel mite tungah kumpi khat beek in a uk ma-in Edom gam sunga kumpite ahi hi
Beor' tapa Bela in Edom gamsung uk a, ama khuapi min Dinhabah ahi hi
Bela si a, Bozrah khua mi Zerah' tapa Jobab in ama tangin a uk hi
Jobab si a, Teman mite' gammi Husham in ama tangin a uk hi
Husham si a, Moab gam sungah Midian mite a zo Bedad' tapa Hadad in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Avith ahi hi
Hadad si a, Masrekah khua mi Samlah in ama tangin uk hi
Samlah si a, Eufratis gun gei-a Rehoboth khua mi Shaul in ama tangin a uk hi
Shaul si a, Akbor' tapa Baalhanan in ama tangin a uk hi
Akbor' tapa Baalhanan si a, Hadar in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Pau ahi hi. Ama zi' min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahab' tanu Matred, Matred tanu Mehetabel ahi hi
Amau' innkuan leh a ten'na, amau' min tawh kizui-in, Esau' suan sung pan minamte' min: Timna, Alvah, Jetheth
Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon
Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar
Magdiel, leh Iram ahi hi. Hihte in amau' neih, amau' ten'na leitang min dingin amau' min mah vawh pah uh a, Esau' suan, Edom mi a kicite ahi uh hi.
